name: @qoder-ai/qodercli

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('rg --version',{stdio:'ignore'})}catch{console.log('\n  ripgrep (rg) not found. Install for best search performance: https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep#installation\n')}"
